title: Find Longest Special Substring That Occurs Thrice I
titleCn: 找出出现至少三次的最长特殊子字符串 I

testcases.input: s = "aaaa" Output: 2 Explanation: The longest special substring which occurs thrice is "aa": substrings "aaaa", "aaaa", and "aaaa". It can be shown that the maximum length achievable is 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The longest special substring which occurs thrice is "aa": substrings "aaaa", "aaaa", and "aaaa". It can be shown that the maximum length achievable is 2.

testcases.input: s = "abcdef" Output: -1 Explanation: There exists no special substring which occurs at least thrice. Hence return -1.
testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: There exists no special substring which occurs at least thrice. Hence return -1.

testcases.input: s = "abcaba" Output: 1 Explanation: The longest special substring which occurs thrice is "a": substrings "abcaba", "abcaba", and "abcaba". It can be shown that the maximum length achievable is 1.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: The longest special substring which occurs thrice is "a": substrings "abcaba", "abcaba", and "abcaba". It can be shown that the maximum length achievable is 1.
